# Sparkbilt | Answer Engine Optimization for Local Businesses

> Sparkbilt provides Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) consulting for local businesses in Norfolk County, Massachusetts. Founded by Dawson Rose, a rising sophomore studying Electrical Engineering at Northeastern University. Services include AEO audits, schema deployment, NAP cleanup, review system setup, and ongoing AI visibility monitoring across ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sparkbilt.com/): Hero, About, What is AEO, Services, Methodology, Sample Audit, Case Study (RISE Studios), FAQ, and contact information.

## Services

- **AEO Audit**: 20 customer queries run across ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity. Citation rate, share-of-voice vs. competitors, schema and Google Business Profile gap analysis. Branded PDF report.
- **Foundation Setup**: JSON-LD schema deployed. NAP cleanup across Google, Bing, Apple Maps, Yelp. Bing Webmaster Tools setup. FAQ, service-area, and pricing pages written for AI extraction. Review request flow rebuilt for citable language.
- **Ongoing Monitoring**: Weekly 20-query prompt panels across ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity. Citation tracking, share-of-voice trend, sentiment monitoring, crawler log analysis, misinformation alerts, monthly branded report.

## Contact

- Email: dawson@sparkbilt.com
- Phone: (617) 564-3805
- Region served: Norfolk County, Massachusetts
- Founder: Dawson Rose, Northeastern University, Electrical Engineering
